title: The One Where The Stripper Cries

lines.speaker: Produced by
lines.text: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller
Final check by Kim
Central Perk. Everyone's sitting on the couch. Monica and Joey enter.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey guys!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, let me tell them!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey is gonna be a celebrity guest on a game show!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really? Which one?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (stopping Joey from answering) Ohh! Fish, seaweed, a sunken ship.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Things you find in the ocean, (to Joey) You're gonna be on "Pyramid"!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, that was our favourite game show ever!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Except for "Match game"...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Or "Win, Lose or Draw".

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What did I marry into?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Would you guys want to come down tomorrow and watch me tape the show?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I can't. We're throwing Phoebe a bachelorette party.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, sorry boys, this ride's closing.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, and Chandler and I have this stupid college alumni thing. I can't believe you get to meet Donny Osmond.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Seriously?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (very excited) Yeah-uh!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross and I always wanted to be Donny and Marie.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You guys just keep getting cooler and cooler!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, we used to perform for our family and friends.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh God, that's right. I blocked that out.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (singing) "I'm a little bit country"...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (singing) "...and I'm a little bit rock 'n' roll"!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Monica) I'm leaving you.
OPENING CREDITS
Class of '91 reunion. Ross and Chandler enter.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So weird to see all these people again... Oh my God, look, there's Geoffrey Cleric.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He was roommates with John Rosoff. He went out with Andrea Tamburino. She dumped him for Michael Skloff.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (looking around) Did I go to this school?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, there's Missy Goldberg. You gotta remember her.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (looks over at her) Sure, nice.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dude. You're married to my sister.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You're right, by saying "nice" I'm virtually licking her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, I hear she's single again, d'you think I should ask her out?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you asking permission to break the pact?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes please.
[Flashback, year 1987. Chandler enters the school's corridor. Ross is hanging some flyers on the wall. Both have a funny 80s hair and clothes.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey. Hey, check out the flyers for the band. I made 'em on a Macintosh in the computer room!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Awesome, the name really stands out.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks to a little something called "Helvetica Bold 24 point"!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Man, we're gonna rock that Asian student union!

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: Hey guys!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, Missy...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You know, our band is playing on Friday.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, yeah. You should come check us out. We're called "Way! No Way!".

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: No way!

lines.speaker: Chandler and Ross
lines.text: Way!

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: Right. I'll be there. (she leaves)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Fresh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Boss!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Mint!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She's gone.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know it. You know, I'm totally gonna ask her out.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dude, I was gonna ask her out.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I said it first, bro.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I thought it first, Holmes.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (angrily) Look, if you did...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Woha! Wait... What are we doing? What we have is too important to mess it up over some girl. I mean, we can get laid anytime we want.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Totally. I had sex in High school...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Me too. I'm good at it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, I'd say we make a pact. Neither of us will go out with Missy Goldberg.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You got it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, so that's Missy Goldberg, Phoebe Cates and Molly Ringwald, who neither of us can go out with.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Those are the pacts!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, and Sheena Easton. But we probably couldn't get her anyway.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, oh... maybe not you!
[We get back to the Class of '91 reunion, where Ross and Chandler are still looking at Missy.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I officially give you permission to break the pact.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thank you. (they shake hands) All right, here I go. Hey, remember how scary it used to be going up to girls in college?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Your hands are shaking.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know, and I can't stop sweating. (he walks towards Missy)
The "Pyramid" Studio.

lines.speaker: Voice
lines.text: Five! Four! Three! Applause!

lines.speaker: Donny Osmond
lines.text: Yeah! Welcome, it is Soap Opera week here on Pyramid, let's meet our contestants. First, Gene Lester is a database specialist, he's gonna be playing with "Days of Our Life's" star Joey Tribbiani! (Joey's amazed at the place and he keeps looking around till he realizes the audience is applauding him)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Gene) I know it could be intimidating for regular people to be around celebrities but... relax, I'm just like you! (pause) Only better looking and richer.

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: ...should be playing with the star of "General Hospital" Leslie Charleson. (applause) Welcome everybody. Good luck to all of you. Let's play Pyramid. All right? Now... we flipped a coin before the show, Gene, you won the toss, so you're gonna start. Which category would you like?

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: I'll take "You crossed the line".

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: You crossed the line. Joey, describe for Gene these things that have lines. Give me 20 seconds on the clock, please. Ready, go!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (on the screen there's the word "Supermarket") Uhm... ok. It's a store, like a supermarket. (there is a sound indicating he made a mistake as he shouldn't have said 'supermarket'. The next word appears, "notebook") Oh! I see-I see what I did. Yeah, ok, ok, uhm... I'm writing in my...

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Diary.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Noo, (whispering) more like a notebook... Damn it! (next word appears: "blueprint") Oh, if I'm building an house, the plan isn't called the 'shmoo-print'... Can't say that either? Woha... hey... (the last word is "Football field" and there are 5 seconds left) In high school, I once had sex with a girl right in the middle of the...

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Cafeteria.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! But that is not what they're looking for. (time's finished) OOOH!
Monica's apartment, where Phoebe's bachelorette party is taking place.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (to Rachel) Thank you so much for this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, d'you like it?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God, it's all so elegant! When's the dirty stuff starting?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You know, the strippers, and the guys dancing, and you know, pee-pee's flying about.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Pheebs, I... there isn't gonna be any flying about! We actually thought we were a little too mature for stuff like that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, ok. I see what you're doing, that's fine. This is all there is, just tea, uh, ok. (she drinks her tea) Hmmmm... raunchy!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Seriously Pheebs, it's not gonna be that kind of a party.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really? So this is... this is my big send off in the married life? Rachel this is the only bachelorette party I'm ever gonna have! I've got a big wad of ones in my purse! Really? I mean, really? It's just tea?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Nooo! Phoebe, of course there is more! I mean, I'll just go and talk to Monica and get an ETA on the pee-pee's!
Joey's at the game show "Pyramid" with host Donny Osmond.

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: Now Gene I must remind you, you need all six of these to stay in the game, all right? Describe for Joey things you find in your refrigerator.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ahaha, he might as well just give us the points.

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: Give me twenty seconds on the clock. Ready? Go!
the first word is cream

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: You put this in your coffee.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: A spoon. Your hands. Your face!

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: It's white!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Paper, snow, a ghost!

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: It's heavier then milk!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: A rock, a dog, the earth.

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Pass!
the second word is mayonnaise

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: You put this on a sandwich.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Salami, anchovies, jam!

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: It's white!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Paper, snow, a ghost!

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: It's made from eggs!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Chickens?

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Pass!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh!
The third word is ketchup

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: You put this on a hamburger!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ketchup!

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Yes!
The fourth word is soda

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Relish!

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Stop!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: Oh, time's up! Joey! You were, uh, almost on a roll there...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah...

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: Uh, Gene, you're gonna have a chance to go to the winner circle in the second half. But right now Henrietta you are going to the winner circle to try your luck for ten thousand dollars, right after this, don't go away.

lines.speaker: Stage Manager
lines.text: And we're out!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, so we didn't win, but it's fun to play the game, right?

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Hey! I got a kid starting college. I've to get surgery on my knee, you just lost me ten grand!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, wow! I'm so sorry, ok? I promise, we'll do better next time!

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Well, I will, because I won't be playing with you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, you know, some of those are pretty hard! Like why would there be a ghost in my fridge? (pause). Yeah!
College reunion party. Ross is talking to Missy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, Saturday night!

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: I'd love to!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: So how come it took you so long to ask me out?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, well, uh, this is gonna sound kinda silly, but, do you remember my roommate Chandler Bing?

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: Sure, he was in your "band"? (she air quotes band)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's been sixteen years but the air quotes still hurt.

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: Sorry.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's ok. Uh, anyway, well he and I both really liked you a lot, uhm, but we didn't want anything to jeopardize our friendship, so we kinda made a pact, that neither of us could ask you out!

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, why?

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: Well, Chandler and I used to make out! A lot!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You did?

lines.speaker: Missy
lines.text: Yeah. We'd go to the science lab after hours!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (angrily) AND ON MY TURF?
Monica's apartment. The bachelorette party.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Rachel) Hey, where is this guy, it's been over an hour!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, he's coming from Jersey, he said he would get here as fast as he could!
someone knocks at the door

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who is it?

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: It's the police!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (pretends to be shocked) Uh! The police!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Excited, running back to her seat) Oh!

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: That's right, it's officer Goodbody.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What's the matter, officer? Has someone been bad? (looks over to Phoebe and she opens the door, and to their dismay, the stripper is an old, short, fat guy who looks exhausted)

lines.speaker: Roy, the male stripper
lines.text: (coughs) Whoo, that's a lot of stairs!
COMMERCIAL BREAK

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Ooh, boy. You should warn people there's no elevator! I should not have had that Mexican food for lunch.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you gonna be ok, officer, uhm,...

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Goodbody!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: ...If-you-say-so.

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: So where's the young lady who I'm supposed to take (he shakes his hips) downtown! (Monica points Phoebe)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, God!

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: All right, somebody show me where to plug in my box, and we'll get this party started! (he thrusts his pelvis towards Phoebe) Whaaaa... (walks back to plug in his cd player) Here? All right.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rachel?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Are you kidding?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, look, we did not know that you wanted a stripper so we went to the phonebook and we got the first name we could find!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: How old is your phonebook?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, this man is gonna get naked in my apartment!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh God no, I don't wanna see him take his clothes off!

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Are you talking about me?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, no! I mean, obviously we want to see you take your clothes off! You big piece of eye candy!

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Ok, ok, ladies! Can I have your attention, please? (pause) Did someone call for the long arm of the law? (He extends his arm from around his crotch and then upward and outward, towards Phoebe) I should warn you, I have a concealed weapon! (Puts his hands over his crotch) I hope you're familiar with the States penal code, ok, ok, enough teasing. Now for some pleasing!

he uses his remote to turn on the music, "Tainted Love" by Soft Cell, and starts dancing for Phoebe. He shakes his butt, moves his shoulders back, grabs his crotch and hops towards Phoebe. Phoebe is half horrified and half scared. He takes his hat off and throws it away, does some "Can Can" high kicks and swings his butt in front of Phoebe who looks at it in disgust. Then he tears open his shirt and shows her his chest and she flinches.

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa (he turn off the music). She cringed!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: This is how I look when I'm turned on!

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: You were talking about me before! Look, I don't need this! I'm outta here! Where's my hat? (goes to get it) Look, I've been in this business for a long time!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Shocking!

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Now if you just pay me my three hundred dollars, I'll be on my way!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Three hundred dollars, are you kidding?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, that's ok, let's me just get my check book!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, you're not gonna pay him, he didn't do anything!

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Didn't do anything? I took a bus all the way from Hoboken. I climbed ... I dunno... like a billion stairs... It's not like I can take them two at a time!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't care. We're not paying you 300 dollars for this.

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Well, look - it's not my fault if you're too uptight to appreciate the male form in all it's glory.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah, okay. I'm uptight. Yeah, that's why I don't want to watch a middle aged guy dance around in what I can only assume is a child halloween costume! (turns to look at Monica and Rachel who look like they feel very sorry for the stripper)

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: I may have borrowed this from my nephew, but let me assure you, what's underneath (points at his groin)... is all man.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm sorry, did you say all man or old man?

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: (making a crying face) Oh, you're mean!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (walks towards Phoebe and the stripper) Uh, look, officer... uhm Sir...

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Damnit. OH! (To Phoebe) Big surprise! The hunk of beef has feelings!
At Pyramid. Joey is with the woman now.

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: Ok Henrietta, you've picked Jack and Jill went up the hill.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Henrietta) My friend Rachel has a kid. I totally know nursery rhymes! (makes a thumbs up sign)

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: Joey describe these things associated with the United States congress. (Joey goes form looking very confident to looking very shocked the instant the word congress is said) Give me 20 seconds on the clock please. Ready? Go!
Camera goes to Joey. The clock is at 20 sec. The word "Legislature" appears. He looks at it blank faced and his eyes shift between Henrietta and his screen

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, .. uh... uh... pass. (Next word: "Rotunda") Pass. (Next word: "Filibuster" stares at it a moment) Pass. (Henrietta is looking very confused) (Next word: "Addendum" 4 seconds remaining) Okay, the little thing that hangs down at the back of your throat.

lines.speaker: Henrietta
lines.text: Uvula!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, then pass. (Next word: "Joint session", but time's up, Joey acts very disappointed)

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: O-kay... Henrietta, you didn't get all the points you needed, so that means Gene, you are going to the winners circle to try for ten thousand dollars! (Gene is clapping his hands looking very happy and so is Joey) And you're gonna be going there with Joey Tribbiani (Both of their smiles fade away instantly)
Class of '91 reunion. Ross is walking angrily towards Chandler, who is talking to two other guys.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Chandler) You made out with Missy Goldberg. How could you do that, after you promised me?
Chandler looks at the other two guys, embarrassed

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to the two guys) Excuse me. (Chandler and Ross move away from them). That didn't make us sound gay at all!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You broke the pact!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross, that was 16 years ago!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That doesn't matter! We're talking about the foundation of our friendship.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I believe the foundation of our friendship was unfortunate hair. (Ross just stares at him) All right, look, if we're really gonna do this... it's not like you never broke one of the pacts.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I didn't.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh really?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh really!?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: NO!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ADRIENNE TURNER!! (A girl behind them turns around)

lines.speaker: Adrienne
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Chandler and Ross
lines.text: Hey! Hey Adrienne. (They move away from her)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I never did anything with Adrienne Turner.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh please, and you knew how much I liked her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't know what... you're talking about.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really?
[Flashback scene: 80's College party.]

lines.speaker: Present Chandler's voice
lines.text: Remember that big party? Freshman year? A week before Christmas vacation? I do. You had some visitors.
An 80's Rachel and fat Monica walk into the party room. Both with funny hair-do's and clothes

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't believe we are at a real college party! (Rachel laughs excitedly) I have to pee so bad!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: This is so awesome! College guys are so cute!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, you've got a boyfriend!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know. But if some guy who looks like Corey Haim wants to kiss me tonight, I'm sooo gonna let them! (They spot Chandler)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Look, there's Chandler. You knew, that stupid friend of Ross'. Said I'm fat. You know I've already lost 4 pounds!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It... You can so totally tell.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I KNOW!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well lets see. Maybe he knows where Ross is. (They walk towards Chandler) Hey, how's it going (tries to look as un-interested in him as possible - checking out her nails).

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Aren't you...?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, Rachel. And this (points to Monica) is Ross' sister, Monica. We met at Thanksgiving. (looks around the room as if searching for something more interesting to do).

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (smiling at Monica) Right. (to Rachel) So how're you doing?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Bitchin'

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi Chandler. It's really nice to see you (rolls her eyes) NOT. (she and Rachel giggle a little and Chandler looks unimpressed)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: O-kay. I'll see if I can find Ross. (Goes off to find Ross.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God Rach. Bean bag chairs.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do NOT let me sit in one of those. We'll be here for days.
Cut to Chandler. He's walking around looking for Ross. He sees him kissing a girl next to a vending machine

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Listen Adrienne, you can't tell Chandler about this.

lines.speaker: Adrienne
lines.text: Oh believe me, Ross, I won't be telling anybody about this.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Cool! (They start kissing again and Chandler looks shocked)
We cut back to the present. The reunion where Chandler and Ross are talking.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I didn't know you knew about that.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I did and it hurt. (they walk towards the bar) That's when I wrote the song: "Betrayal In The Common Room".

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (looks disappointed in himself) Man... I... I'm sorry.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look (hands him a drink) it was a lo-o-ong time ago.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, eh. I made out with Adrienne and you made out with Missy. Well I guess we're even.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (smiling a little nervously) Hmm mmmhm..

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We are even, right?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sighs) Just one more thing. I was so pissed at you that night that I wanted to get back at you. So I thought, who does Ross like the more than anybody?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (thinks about it for a few seconds) What did you do to my mom?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Not her!
[Flashback scene: We cut back to the 80's party. Rachel and Monica are "dancing".]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I am sooo drunk.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's weird. I've had the same number of beers as you and I don't feel anything at all. (Chandler approaches)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Soo... you girls having fun?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: For your information, ass munch, I've lost four pounds. Maybe even five with all the dancing. (A guy enters holding a pizza box)

lines.speaker: Pizza guy
lines.text: SOMEBODY ORDER A PIZZA?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh THATS ME! (she runs to the pizza guy)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (finishing the last of her drink) I am soo not going to do good on my SATs tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well maybe if you go to school here next year we can totally hang out.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sarcastic) Oh yeah. There is a plan! Why don't I just start taking my smart pills now?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, maybe you can get in on a beauty scholarship.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (blushing) Oh, what a line. (walks towards the drinks table with her back towards Chandler and whispers "Oh my God!")

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So where are you applying to?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh well, You know, I think it's kinda really important that I go somewhere where there's sun, so I'm sort of... (Chandler leans in an kisses her) (She pulls away) Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm in college and I'm in a band.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (She considers it for a second) Yeah okay. (She puts her hands around his neck and they start kissing again)
Monica's apartment. The stripper is sitting at the kitchen table. Monica, Rachel and Phoebe are standing around him

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: What's the matter? You never saw a 50 year old stripper cry before?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You know, it's fine. We'll pay you.

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: No, no, you're right. Who am I kidding? I should have hung up that breakaway jockstrap years ago. What am I gonna do? I mean, this has been my life for thirty two years. Taking my clothes off in front of people is all I know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, wait. No there's gotta be something else that you can do. I mean, what skills do you have?

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: I don't know... I can make my pecs dance... I can pick up a dollar bill with my butt cheeks... I can go to that special place inside me where I feel no shame.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So maybe something in an office.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Or you could teach stripping. You know, share your gift, pass the torch.

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: You know, actually that's not a bad idea. I can do it out of my apartment. I don't think my mom would mind.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: There you go. Okay, do you think you're gonna be okay?

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Yeah, yeah, yeah... This is so weird. I mean, you never know when it's gonna be your last dance. And I didn't even get a chance to finish it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (after a pause) Finish it!

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Your last dance. Do it for us.

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to Phoebe) Really?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, yeah. He deserves to do the thing he loves one last time.

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: Okay, all right... Get ready ladies!

they sit down and Roy plays "You Make Me Feel" by Sylvester on his boom box, and starts... With his back towards the girls, he starts waving his hands, then backs towards the girls slapping his butt, then swings it around, and makes thrusting pelvic movements in front of Phoebe. He dances around the tables in between all the girls, and gets back into the kitchen part of the room. He then tears off one of his sleeves and throws it towards Monica and Rachel, who fight over who gets it. He then tears off his other sleeve and moves it back and forth between his legs, getting closer to Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh this is so ho-o-ot!
Roy then sits on Phoebe's lap, looking exhausted

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh no, no, no, don't stop!

lines.speaker: Roy
lines.text: (out of breath) Have to...
The game show studio. Joey and Gene are sitting in the winner circle.

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: Well, welcome to the Winner Circle. Joey and Gene, you guys ready?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (nervously) Yeah...

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: (irritable) Sure. (Joey gets even more nervous)

lines.speaker: Donny
lines.text: Okay. Give me sixty seconds on the clock please... Ready, GO! (runs off)
the screen says "6 to win" and "types of trees"

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Oak, maple, elm, birch...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I-I-I don't know. Types of trees?
Joey hears the bell which means his answer is correct and is surprised. The screen now says "5 to win" and "Spanish words"

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Uhm... Buenos dias, enchilada, por favor...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (sympathetic) Oh, I'm so sorry. I don't know any Spanish words.
There's the next bell, and the correct answer. The screen changes to "4 to win" and "things that burn". Gene now realizes that he got two correct answers and gets up in his seat.

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: A match, a candle...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Things that go "tssst" when you put them out.

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: A torch, a bonfire... (Joey seems lost) uhm, your pee...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Things that burn.
and another bell for the correct answer. "3 to win" and "What a dog might say"

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: "I'd like to go for a walk", uhm "scratch my belly".

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude, dude! I think you're losing it.

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Uhm, "I have fur", "I like to bark".

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, oh, oh... What a dog says.
the bell sounds again, "2 to win" and "pizza toppings"

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Pepperoni...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (instantly) Pizza toppings, next!
there's 10 seconds left, "1 to win" and "Supermodels"

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Cindy Crawford, Christie Brinkley, Heidi Klum, Claudia Schiffer...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, oh, oh... (5 seconds left)

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: Christie Turlington, Kate Moss...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Girls Chandler could never get?

lines.speaker: Gene
lines.text: (irritated) Supermodels!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Where? (looking around)
Chandler and Monica's apartment. Monica's there and Ross and Chandler walk in.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, where's Rachel?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She and Phoebe took the stripper to the hospital.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Did you know Chandler kissed Rachel?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What? When was this?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Nineteen Eighty Seven. The weekend you guys visited me at school.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! That's wild!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, but it was like a million years ago, so it doesn't matter.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, it matters to me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Because... the night you kissed Rachel was the night I kissed Rachel for the very first time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You kissed her that night too?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Two guys in one night? Wow, I thought she became a slut after she got her nose fixed.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Seriously, where did this happen?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, after you told me she was passed out in our room, I went in there to make sure she was all right. She was lying on my bed, all buried in peoples coats. Well, I went to kiss her on the forehead, you know. But it was so dark, I accidentally got her lips. I started to pull away, but then I felt her start to kiss me back. It was only for a second, but... it was amazing. And now, now I find out that you kissed her first.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh wait... What bed did you say she was on?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Mine.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm pretty sure I put her on my bed.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, she was definitely on my bed.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why would I kiss a girl, and then put her on your bed?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, then who was on my bed?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (screeching) OH! Oh, oh! (holding her hand in front of her mouth)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (realizing) NO! No, no!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: YES! (Chandler gets an "oh no!" look on his face)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You were under the pile of coats?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I was the pile of coats!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: OH MY GOD!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You were my Midnight Mystery Kisser?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You were my first kiss with Rachel?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You were my first kiss ever?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What did I marry into?
COMMERCIAL BREAK
Back at the party in 1987. People are dancing to "Disco Inferno" by The Trammps.

Monica is dancing. At first she seems insecure and moves slowly, but then gets into the groove and swings her hips from side to side while holding her hands up. She then eats the last piece of pizza she was holding and again moves her hips from side to side, pushing her hands in the air in beat with the music. Her moves get more wildly while she's snapping her fingers. She loses balance and falls back onto a pink bean bag.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, crap!
THE END
